chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2636 - وَ سَأَلَهُ أَبُو بَصِيرٍ اَلْمُرَادِيُّ : عَنِ اَلْقَزِّ تَلْبَسُهُ اَلْمَرْأَةُ فِي اَلْإِحْرَامِ قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ إِنَّمَا يُكْرَهُ اَلْحَرِيرُ اَلْمُبْهَمُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2636 - Abu Basir al-Muradi asked Imam (as) about a woman wearing qazz (a fabric made from silk and other materials) while in Ihram.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in it. What is disliked is pure silk (al-harir al-mubham)."
